document, not a textbook template. Include market-specific detail (India, ASCI, FSSAI, INR pricing).

1. GENERAL INFORMATION
   - Event ID, issue date, submission deadline, contact
   - Brand background (NourishKids: fortified snacks for kids 4-12 years, India metros + Tier 1)
   - Evaluation criteria (price, capability, compliance, experience)

2. TIMELINES
   - RFQ issue, clarification deadline, submission deadline
   - Shortlisting, presentation dates, award date
   - Project kickoff and campaign go-live (target: September 2025)

3. SCOPE OF WORK — for each of the 8 line items, provide:
   - Detailed deliverable list
   - Volume/quantity expectations
   - Quality standards
   - Dependencies

   2. TVC development
   3. TVC production
   4. Social organic content
   5. Social paid media planning
   6. Social paid media buying and optimization

   8. Launch program management

   - Budget indicative range (if appropriate)
   - Cost structure transparency requirements

5. VENDOR QUESTIONNAIRE (minimum 10 questions)
   - Capability, experience, team, financial stability
   - Kids advertising compliance capability
   - TVC production track record
   - Sub-contractor disclosure

6. COMPLIANCE REQUIREMENTS
   - ASCI Kids Advertising Code compliance
   - FSSAI health claims regulations
   - Platform-specific policies (YouTube Kids, Meta under-13)

# APEX CREATIVE CO.
## Proposal for NourishKids Brand Launch Campaign
**RFQ Reference:** RFQ-MKT-2025-NKL-001 | **Submitted:** 5 February 2025 | **Validity:** 90 days

---

### EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

Apex Creative Co. is pleased to submit this comprehensive proposal for the NourishKids brand launch. With 18 years in FMCG marketing — including breakthrough campaigns for Nestlé India, Britannia, Marico, and Dabur — we bring deep category knowledge and proven regulatory navigation capability to this mandate.

Our proposed investment: **INR 4,20,00,000** (excluding GST and media buying commission), covering all 8 line items in the RFQ.

We believe NourishKids has a differentiated story to tell: nutrition without compromise, in a format kids actually want. Our campaign platform — *"Snack Smart, Grow Strong"* — was developed as a concept during our briefing process and is available for discussion at the presentation stage.

---

### SECTION 1: SCOPE OF WORK RESPONSE

#### Line Item 1: Strategy and Creative Development
**Deliverables:**
- Full brand strategy document (positioning, proposition, reason-to-believe for parent + child audiences)
- Campaign creative brief and creative platform
- 3 creative concept directions with full rationale and visual references
- Key messaging architecture (parent audience, child audience, retailer)
- Visual identity guidelines for the NourishKids campaign

**Assumptions:** We will work from NourishPlus brand guidelines and market research to be shared at kickoff. Primary research (if required beyond what is shared) is not included.

**Timeline:** Weeks 1–6 from project kickoff

---

#### Line Item 2: TVC Development
**Deliverables:**
- 2 x 30-second TVC scripts — one in Hindi, one adapted to English
- 4 x 10-second cutdown scripts (2 Hindi, 2 English)
- Full storyboards for all 6 formats
- Animatic for client approval before production

**Important note:** The English TVC will be a language adaptation of the Hindi master TVC. Both will be broadcast-ready but share the same core narrative and visual concept. We do not develop independent creative routes per language as standard practice.

**Timeline:** Weeks 4–10 from kickoff

---

#### Line Item 3: TVC Production
**Deliverables:**
- Full production of 2 x 30-second TVCs + 4 x 10-second cutdowns
- Casting: minimum 20 child actors shortlisted; 5 selected with parental consent documentation
- Location scouting: minimum 2 options in Mumbai or Delhi presented
- Director: from our empanelled roster (primary and backup director options confirmed)
- Post-production: colour grading, sound design, broadcast format delivery (HD + SD + digital)
- ASCI compliance certificate for broadcast

**Production note:** Each TVC includes 1 day of principal photography. Additional shoot days, if required due to scope change, are billed at INR 8 lakhs per day. Out-of-city locations (outside Mumbai/Delhi) attract travel and accommodation at cost.

**Timeline:** Weeks 8–18 from kickoff

---

#### Line Item 4: Social Organic Content
**Deliverables:**
- 60 posts/month across Instagram, Facebook, and YouTube for 6 months
- Monthly content calendar submitted 15 days in advance
- Post breakdown: Instagram Reels (8/month), YouTube Shorts (4/month), Instagram Carousels (12/month), Instagram Static (16/month), Facebook posts (20/month)
- 10 nano-influencer collaborations per month: briefing, coordination, content review
- Community management on weekdays (comments responded within 4 hours)

**Exclusions:** Influencer fees are excluded from this proposal. We recommend a budget of INR 5,000–15,000 per nano-influencer post based on current market rates.

**Timeline:** Content creation begins Week 14 (6 weeks before go-live); community management from go-live.

---

#### Line Item 5: Social Paid Media Planning
**Deliverables:**
- Paid media strategy document
- Platform recommendation with rationale (Meta, YouTube, OTT — Hotstar and SonyLIV recommended)
- Audience targeting framework with 5 defined segments
- Budget allocation model (developed based on INR 1 Crore monthly media spend assumption; actual budget to be confirmed by client)
- KPI framework: Reach, frequency, video completion rate, website traffic, brand search lift

**Note:** The budget allocation model is built on an assumption of INR 1 Cr/month gross media spend. If the actual budget differs significantly, the model will need revision.

**Timeline:** Weeks 10–12 from kickoff

---

## A Comprehensive, All-Inclusive Proposal for the NourishKids Brand Launch
### "Building Brands That Last"

**Submitted to:** NourishPlus Foods India Ltd., Marketing Procurement
**Date:** 4 February 2025 | **RFQ:** RFQ-MKT-2025-NKL-001 | **Validity:** 60 days

---

## EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

Brandsmith Group is proud to present this all-inclusive, integrated proposal for the NourishKids brand launch campaign. As a full-service agency with 12 years of experience across brand building, advertising, production, and digital marketing, we are uniquely positioned to deliver a seamless, integrated campaign.

**Our proposed investment for the complete NourishKids campaign: INR 3,90,00,000 (Three Crore Ninety Lakhs Only)**

This is a comprehensive, all-inclusive proposal covering all deliverables mentioned in the RFQ. We guarantee campaign go-live within **6–8 weeks of project kickoff.**

One agency. One team. One vision. No coordination headaches. No surprises.

---

## ABOUT BRANDSMITH GROUP

Brandsmith Group was founded in 2013 by industry veterans from Ogilvy and JWT. Over 12 years, we've served 150+ brands across FMCG, retail, and consumer tech, winning 5 Kyoorius Awards and 2 Effie Awards along the way.

Our **Brand Guarantee Program** — if agreed campaign KPIs are not met within 6 months, we provide an additional month of media management at no extra charge. (Full terms and conditions of the Brand Guarantee apply; available on request.)

---

## SCOPE AND DELIVERABLES

### Line Item 1: Brand Strategy & Creative Development — **INR 40,00,000**
Full brand strategy, creative platform development, 3 campaign concept routes, and final creative direction. Includes synthesis of provided secondary research; primary consumer research (if needed) would be additional.

### Line Item 2: TVC Development — **INR 32,00,000**
Script, storyboard, and animatic for:
- 2 x 30-second TVC scripts (Hindi)
- 2 x 10-second cutdown scripts (Hindi)

*English language TVC versions are available at an additional cost of INR 8,00,000. Please advise if English language TVCs are required.*

### Line Item 3: TVC Production — **INR 1,60,00,000**
Full production:
- 2 x 30-second TVCs (Hindi) + 2 x 10-second cutdowns
- Casting, location, direction, post-production
- Broadcast delivery formats

*Note: Travel and accommodation for crew required outside Mumbai are charged at actuals and are not included in the above cost.*

### Line Item 4: Social Organic Content — **INR 60,00,000**
- 45 posts/month for 6 months across Instagram (20/month), Facebook (15/month), YouTube (10/month)
- Content calendar and client approval workflow
- 8 nano/micro influencer collaborations per month

*On volume: We are recommending 45 posts/month rather than 60. Based on platform algorithm changes in 2024, quality and consistency outperform volume. We will discuss this recommendation in the presentation.*

*Influencer fees: Included for nano-influencers only (posts valued up to INR 5,000 per post). Micro-influencer fees (INR 5,000–50,000 per post) are additional and billed at actuals.*

### Line Item 5: Social Paid Media Planning — **INR 15,00,000**
Comprehensive paid media strategy, platform selection, audience framework, budget model, and KPI plan.

### Line Item 6: Social Paid Media Buying & Optimization

We offer end-to-end paid media management. Given that this is included in our all-inclusive package, the paid media buying and optimization service is part of our integrated offering to NourishPlus.

*On reflection, for a 6-month campaign at the expected scale, dedicated paid media resources require separate allocation. Please note the paid media management fee below:*

**Paid Media Management Fee: INR 35,00,000** *(6 months; campaign setup, daily management, weekly reporting, monthly review)*

### Line Item 7: Kids Advertising & Claims Compliance — **INR 12,00,000**
Brandsmith is ASCI compliant. Our creatives are always designed with regulatory guidelines in mind. We have an internal review process for all advertising claims and ensure all content is appropriate for the target audience.

### Line Item 8: Launch Program Management — **INR 10,00,000**
- Dedicated project coordinator
- Weekly status reports
- Risk management and escalation

---

|-----------|------------|
| 1. Brand Strategy & Creative | 40,00,000 |
| 2. TVC Development (Hindi only) | 32,00,000 |
| 3. TVC Product
